heading: Retrieve Snapshot Export Job
body:
To retrieve one snapshot export job by its ID, send a `GET`
request to the Cloud Backups [endpoint](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-getgroupclusterbackupexport) with the ID of the export job.

To retrieve all running snapshot export jobs, send a `GET`
request to the Cloud Backups [endpoint](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-listgroupclusterbackupexports).
